CHAR 2 Medications: number of medications. This field indicates the number of different medications taken by the resident in the last 7 days.
465 O2 O2_NEW_MEDS (O2) New Medications CHAR 1 Medications: new medications. This field indicates if the resident began receiving new medications during the last 90 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
466 O3 O3_INJECTIONS (O3) Injections CHAR 1 Medications: injections (number days). This field indicates the number of days the resident received
